revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-5-070

Alternative term: Watch circle

Circle within which a vessel or buoy may ride at its mooring, under the influence of currents and tides.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Drift circle}}
